chapter_title: 4. Supporting students with long term special education and other support needs
snippet: This information describes how schools support students with long term special educational and other support needs. The department provides specific templates and resources for student learning and attendance where there are long-term special education needs: Schools must create an effective and sensitive information exchange system approved by the student and parents/guardians, that: Refer to Attendance and Individual Education Plans (IEPs) for further guidance about support strategies. Schools are recommended to upgrade equipment to enhance curriculum access, if required.
